_doc: parallax tiers config for maiwang-claude. Overrides the daemon's inline DEFAULTS via a SHALLOW merge — each key below REPLACES its default wholesale, so every list is complete. atypes/addressed mirror the shared artifact_types registry default_tier (source of truth); adjust only on merit and record why.
_self_name_doc: our repo id. A partner doc with `addressed_to: maiwang-claude` frontmatter is T1 (a cross-team ask demanding our response).
_addressed_doc: artifact_types that are T1 UNCONDITIONALLY — a cross-team ask demanding a response (registry tier 1).
_addressed_to_us_doc: left empty: the parent-based heuristic never fires (cross-repo parent refs are forbidden). Use the explicit `addressed_to:` frontmatter field instead (honored via self_name).
_atypes_doc: type -> tier, mirroring artifact_types registry default_tier. reaction/cross_check/proposal live in `addressed` (unconditional T1) so they are not repeated here.
_triggers_doc: path prefixes whose changes cause a commit to be inspected. Added `.plan/` and `AGENTS.md` over the defaults so partner changes there are not silently skipped. With `.plan/` also in doc_dirs (below), a partner .plan/*.md is now classified by artifact_type, not just surfaced. AGENTS.md changes are governance-relevant.
_contracts_doc: shared interface artifacts — a change here is T2 (validate + converge).
_doc_dirs_doc: path prefixes under which a partner .md file is treated as a CLASSIFIABLE doc (frontmatter -> tier), not just surfaced. Requires parallax >= the doc_dirs-config release (submodule pinned at 0869288). Added .plan/ so a partner's .plan/*.md classifies by artifact_type instead of landing in unclassified/manual-review.
_promote_brainstorm_doc: opt-in topic-alignment: a partner `brainstorm` (default T3) under docs/ is promoted to T2 when it shares >= min_overlap substantive topic tokens with one of OUR recent (<= days) `plan` docs. Note: only fires for docs/ brainstorms that get classified — not for .plan/ files (which surface as unclassified).
